Class Player

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
public class Player extends Object
Player class represents a participant in the poker game. It stores information such as the player's name, avatar, hand of cards, chip count, bet status, and connection endpoint.

Players can perform actions such as receiving cards, betting, folding, and discarding their hand. The class also tracks whether a player has gone all-in or disconnected from the game.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name, int avatarIndex, int startingChips)
      Constructs a new Player with the specified name, avatar index, and starting amount of chips.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the player
      avatarIndex - the index of the player's avatar
      startingChips - the number of chips the player starts with

  • Method Details

    • receiveCard

      public void receiveCard(Card card)
      Adds a card to the player's hand.
      Parameters:
      card - the card to receive

    • fold

      public void fold()
      Folds the player, removing them from the current round.

    • discardCards

      public void discardCards()
      Discards the player's hand and resets their current bet.

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Disconnects the player from the server by nullifying the endpoint.

    • hasFolded

      public boolean hasFolded()
      Checks if the player has folded.
      Returns:
      true if the player has folded; false otherwise

      public ArrayList<Card> getHand()

    • getChips

      public int getChips()
      Returns the number of chips the player currently holds.

      the player's chip count

    • getBet

      public int getBet()
      Returns the player's current bet.
      Returns:
      the amount of chips the player has bet

    • setBet

      public void setBet(int bet)
      Sets the player's bet amount.

      bet - the amount to set as the player's bet

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the player's name.
      Returns:
      the name of the player

    • getEndpoint

      public ServerEndpoint getEndpoint()
      Checks if the player is disconnected.
      Returns:
      true if the player is disconnected; false otherwise

    • setChips

      public void setChips(int chips)
      Sets the number of chips the player has.
      Parameters:
      chips - the chip count to assign

    • isAllIn

      public boolean isAllIn()
      Returns whether the player is all-in.
      Returns:
      true if the player is all-in; false otherwise

    • setAllIn

      public void setAllIn(boolean allIn)
      Sets whether the player is all-in.
      Parameters:
      allIn - the all-in status to set

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the player, including their name, hand, and chip count.

      toString in class Object

      string describing the player

    • setFolded

      public void setFolded(boolean b)
      Sets the folded status of the player.

      b - true if the player has folded; false otherwise

    • getAvatarIndex

      public int getAvatarIndex()
      Returns the index of the player's avatar.

      the avatar index

    • setEndpoint

      public void setEndpoint(ServerEndpoint serverEndpoint)
      Sets the ServerEndpoint for the player.
